---
title: "2025-W14"
---


- [science] [Inside arXiv—the Most Transformative Platform in All of Science](https://www.wired.com/story/inside-arxiv-most-transformative-code-science/)

  The story of Paul Ginsparg

- [food] [Saffron, the World's Most Expensive Spice, Is Now Grown in the U.S.](https://www.nytimes.com/2025/01/02/dining/saffron-farming-crop.html)

- [world] [New Lives in the City: How Taleban have experienced life in Kabul](https://www.afghanistan-analysts.org/en/reports/context-culture/new-lives-in-the-city-how-taleban-have-experienced-life-in-kabul/)

  To be honest, every time I go with them, they pressure me to play and listen to music in the car. At first, I was resisting, but now I have given in, with the one condition that they turn it off when passing through security checkpoints because many other Taleban don’t like it, and it’s bad for a Taleb to be seen listening to it.
